headline: Bioclate (Armour: Baxter International) Market Research Report 2026: Epidemiology, Pipeline Analysis, Trends, Strategies, & Forecasts, 2020-2025, 2025-2030F, 2035F
summary: Major opportunities in the bioclate (Armour) market include personalized hemophilia care growth, expanding home infusion programs, and increased access in emerging markets. headline: Vertex passes key test in quest to treat kidney diseases
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals said its drug for a rare kidney condition succeeded in a Phase 3 trial.
